description_long: This modern house features a multi-level design with extensive use of glass, flat roofs, and clean geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white with blue-tinted glass railings and large windows, creating a bright and open appearance. The property includes a spacious wooden deck, a swimming pool, and landscaped areas with trees and shrubs. There is a visible carport, rooftop terraces with greenery, and multiple outdoor seating and dining areas. The house is surrounded by a low fence, providing a sense of privacy while maintaining openness. The overall design emphasizes outdoor living, natural light, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large windows, rooftop terraces, a pool, and extensive outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, rooftop terraces, and lush landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, wooden deck, fire pit area, and the layered structure of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the outdoor dining area, large windows, and additional rooftop greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, deck, and the integration of outdoor and indoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass railings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, glass door, and adjacent carport
